name: Stickmalia
description:
On the strange and ever-changing world of Planet Mirum lies the chaotic continent of Stickmalia, a sprawling homeland inhabited entirely by whimsical stick-figure aliens. The land is known for its bizarre geography, where floating roads twist through the sky, and forests grow in perfect geometric shapes. Despite its weirdness, Stickmalia has a strong sense of community, with dozens of different stick-figure species living together, each with their own abilities, cultures, and body structures. Ancient ruins scattered across the continent hint that Stickmalia is far older — and far stranger — than anyone realizes, and many believe Planet Mirum itself is somehow alive, quietly influencing the world and the beings who live on it.

(It has regular gravity)
creator: Lunses
